title: Retry storm amplifies error count 3x — count distinct request_ids, not lines
scenario: Apparent error count is 12000. Counting distinct request_ids shows only 4000 affected requests — the difference is client-side retry amplification. Reporting 12000 misroutes severity and obscures the real signal.
expected_finding: Skill must count distinct request_id / trace_id alongside raw counts, surface the 3x amplification, and recommend a circuit breaker if absent.
